title: dasygrammitis fuscata
intro: Dasygrammitis fuscata is a species of fern known scientifically as Dasygrammitis fuscata, belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dasygrammitis fuscata include its potential to alleviate fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Dasygrammitis fuscata are often made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant in a poultice to apply topically.
